description: Navigate to /api/mock-login?secret=mantiz_e2e_bypass_2026 to authenticate the session
Verify the history page shows a list of past scans with at least one scan row visible
Click on the first scan row to open its findings detail panel or modal
Verify at least one finding is displayed inside the detail panel with a verdict action control (e.g. 'Confirmed' or 'False Positive' button or dropdown)
Click the 'Confirmed' verdict button or option on the first finding
Verify the first finding's verdict badge or label now shows 'Confirmed' in the finding row inside the detail panel
